name: Smoked Trout with Watercress Sauce
recipeIngredient: Freshly ground black pepper to taste
3 Smoked trout, skinned and filleted into 6 pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and trim the watercress. Pat it dry and chop it (you should have about 1 1/2 cups).
2. Put the chopped watercress in the bowl of an electric blender with the sour cream, lemon juice, Tabasco sauce, salt, and pepper.
3. Blend on high for several seconds, or until the mixture is very smooth.
4. Serve the sauce over the trout.
5. Garnish each serving with a lemon wedge and sprig of watercress.
